releaseNotes:
Experience and sound design refresh.

Highlights:
- Added a generated local soundscape for launch, navigation, send, receive, completion, approval, delete, and error states
- Added Settings controls for enabling sound effects and adjusting volume
- Refined the Windows 11 visual system with richer dark surfaces, cleaner light mode contrast, tighter borders, elevated controls, and a more polished title bar/sidebar/input dock
- Improved message and agent activity card styling for clearer hierarchy and a more modern native desktop feel
